Fields.Name: Disable Param - Network Test
Fields.Description: Parameters marked with  are excluded in the NT version package.

Fields.Name: Match Area ID
Fields.Description: Simple match area ID

Fields.Name: Multiplayer Start Limit - Event Flag ID
Fields.Description: Multiplayer start limit event flag ID

Fields.Name: Disable Intrusion if Other Ghost In Range
Fields.Description: Other distances that cannot be invaded by spirits. The intrusion position is searched for the intrusion points within the other ghost invasion impossible distance to the other ghost invasion range upper limit from the host position.

Fields.Name: Player Position Save Limit - Event Flag ID
Fields.Description: PC position save restriction event flag ID (flag ON - PC position save valid flag OFF - PC position save invalid 0 - PC position save always valid)

Fields.Name: Boss Area ID
Fields.Description: Areas with the same ID are treated as the same boss area.

Fields.Name: White Phantom Entity ID - Free Frame
Fields.Description: NPC White Spirit Summon Ritual Summon The beginning of the free frame ID used as the NPC's entity ID

Fields.Name: Is Map Guardian Region
Fields.Description: Whether to increase or decrease the frame of the map protection area

Fields.Name: Is Yellow Monk Region
Fields.Description: Is it the old man sign area of yellow robe?

Fields.Name: Target Flag State - Multiplayer Start Limit ID [1]
Fields.Description: Flag state that limits multiplayer start restriction event flag ID

Fields.Name: Target Flag State - Invasion Start Limit ID [1]
Fields.Description: Flag state that limits intrusion restriction event flag ID1

Fields.Name: Target Flag State - White Sign Start Limit ID [1]
Fields.Description: Flag state that limits white sign restriction event flag ID1

Fields.Name: Target Flag State - Red Sign Start Limit ID [1]
Fields.Description: Flag state that limits red sign limit event flag ID1

Fields.Name: Target Flag State - Invasion Start Limit ID [2]
Fields.Description: Flag state that limits intrusion restriction event flag ID2

Fields.Name: Target Flag State - Invasion Start Limit ID [3]
Fields.Description: Flag state that limits intrusion restriction event flag ID3

Fields.Name: Target Flag State - White Sign Start Limit ID [2]
Fields.Description: Flag state that limits white sign restriction event flag ID2

Fields.Name: Warp Item Usage Permitted - Bonfire ID [1]
Fields.Description: Bonfire entity ID1 used to determine whether to allow the use of warp items

Fields.Name: Warp Item Usage Permitted - Bonfire ID [2]
Fields.Description: Bonfire entity ID 2 used to determine permission to use warp items

Fields.Name: Warp Item Usage Permitted - Bonfire ID [3]
Fields.Description: Bonfire entity ID 3 used to determine permission to use warp items

Fields.Name: Warp Item Usage Permitted - Bonfire ID [4]
Fields.Description: Bonfire entity ID 4 used to determine permission to use warp items

Fields.Name: Warp Item Usage Permitted - Bonfire ID [5]
Fields.Description: Bonfire entity ID 5 used to determine permission to use warp items

Fields.Name: Warp Item Prohibition - Event Flag ID [1]
Fields.Description: Event flag ID 1 to determine the prohibition of warp items. Warp item permission Higher priority than judgment by bonfire ID

Fields.Name: Warp Item Prohibition - Event Flag ID [2]
Fields.Description: Event flag ID 2 to determine the prohibition of warp items. Warp item permission Higher priority than judgment by bonfire ID

Fields.Name: Warp Item Prohibition - Event Flag ID [3]
Fields.Description: Event flag ID 3 to determine the prohibition of warp items. Warp item permission Higher priority than judgment by bonfire ID

Fields.Name: Warp Item Prohibition - Event Flag ID [4]
Fields.Description: Event flag ID 4 to determine the prohibition of warp items. Warp item permission Higher priority than judgment by bonfire ID

Fields.Name: Warp Item Prohibition - Event Flag ID [5]
Fields.Description: Event flag ID 5 to determine the prohibition of warp items. Warp item permission Higher priority than judgment by bonfire ID

Fields.Name: Enable Bloodstain
Fields.Description: Effective bloodstain / death illusion

Fields.Name: Enable Blood Message
Fields.Description: Blood character valid

Fields.Name: Enable Ghost
Fields.Description: Phantom effective

Fields.Name: Display Mask M00
Fields.Description: Whether to display on map M00

Fields.Name: Display Mask M01
Fields.Description: Whether to display on map M01

Fields.Name: Target Flag State - White Sign Start Limit ID [3]
Fields.Description: Flag state that limits white sign restriction event flag ID3

Fields.Name: Target Flag State - Red Sign Start Limit ID [2]
Fields.Description: Flag state that limits red sign limit event flag ID2

Fields.Name: Target Flag State - Red Sign Start Limit ID [3]
Fields.Description: Flag state that limits red sign limit event flag ID3

Fields.Name: Is Automatic Invasion Point
Fields.Description: Is it an intrusion point automatic generation? If it is set to , the intrusion position is searched by the automatically generated logic for the intrusion point.

Fields.Name: Block Yellow Monk Multiplayer - Event Flag ID
Fields.Description: Yellow Coat Host Restriction Event Flag - When this flag is turned on, multiplayer as a host of Yellow Coat is prohibited. It is assumed that the block clear flag will be inserted. 0 - No limit

Fields.Name: Other Ghost Invasion Range - Max Limit
Fields.Description: Other ghost invasion range upper limit. The intrusion position is searched for the intrusion points within the other ghost invasion impossible distance to the other ghost invasion range upper limit from the host position.

Fields.Name: Summoning Pool Open - Event Flag ID
Fields.Description: Sign accumulation release event flag ID

Fields.Name: Map Area
Fields.Description: Area number (mXX_00_00_00). Data for specifying the display position in the map menu

Fields.Name: Map Block
Fields.Description: Grid X number (m00_XX_00_00). Data for specifying the display position in the map menu

Fields.Name: Map Region
Fields.Description: Grid Z number (m00_00_XX_00). Data for specifying the display position in the map menu

Fields.Name: Coordinate - X
Fields.Description: X coordinates (relative coordinates from the specified map). Data for specifying the display position in the map menu

Fields.Name: Coordinate - Y
Fields.Description: Y coordinates (relative coordinates from the specified map). Data for specifying the display position in the map menu. Not actually used, but keep XYZ aligned

Fields.Name: Coordinate - Z
Fields.Description: Z coordinates (relative coordinates from the specified map). Data for specifying the display position in the map menu

Fields.Name: Invasion Restriction - Event Flag ID [1]
Fields.Description: Intrusion restriction event flag ID1

Fields.Name: Summon Restriction - Event Flag ID [1]
Fields.Description: White sign limit event flag ID1

Fields.Name: Summoning Pool Restriction - Event Flag ID
Fields.Description: Sign accumulation registration restriction Event flag ID (Flag ON - Sign accumulation registration is permitted Flag OFF - Sign accumulation registration is prohibited 0 - Sign accumulation registration is always permitted)
